label: Textilvarutillverkning
description: Branschspecifik scaffold för textilvarutillverkning med fokus på produktionskapacitet, produktområden, material/kompetens och tydlig kontaktväg för förfrågningar.
primaryJobs: bygga förtroende med referenser, process och företagsfakta
driva kontakt för offert, dialog eller produktspecifikation

routes.purpose: Positionera textiltillverkaren, förklara erbjudandet och leda vidare till kontakt eller produktöversikt.
Visa företagets produktområden eller textila kategorier med tydlig beskrivning av vad som tillverkas.
Beskriva tillverkningsprocess, material, kapacitet och arbetssätt för att hjälpa kunder bedöma om företaget passar deras behov.
Bygga förtroende genom företagets bakgrund, team, arbetssätt och synliga företagsuppgifter.
Göra det enkelt att skicka förfrågan eller ta kontakt via formulär, e-post, telefon och adress.

routes.when: när företaget har kundcase, bildmaterial eller omdömen som stärker trovärdigheten
när återkommande frågor om material, minsta order, ledtider eller specialanpassning behöver besvaras separat

sectionOrderRules: Hero must state what kinds of textile products the company manufactures and include a primary CTA.
Product summary should show concrete product categories or manufacturing areas, not vague claims.
Production summary should appear before the final CTA and briefly explain materials, methods or customization possibilities.
Trust proof must rely on real references, visible company details or documented experience, never invented certifications or quantities.
Sections should avoid repeating the same claims about quality or flexibility.
Products intro must connect the company's manufacturing focus to the listed product areas.
Product list items must be specific textile product categories, uses or customer segments, not generic placeholders.
If pricing overview is shown, it should present honest starting points, examples or quotation logic rather than misleading fixed promises.
Production intro must explain how the company works with manufacturing, customization or series production in concrete terms.
Process steps should follow a logical sequence such as inquiry, specification, production and delivery.
Materials and capabilities must describe actual fabrics, techniques, volumes or customization options only when supported by input data.
Trust proof, if present, should reinforce reliability without repeating the same evidence already shown in adjacent sections.
About story must describe the business in specific, factual terms and may include history, niche or working philosophy.
Team should only be rendered when actual people or roles are available.
Trust proof should include visible company information such as organisation number, references or practical experience when available.
Contact info must include real contact paths available in the source data.
Contact form should support quote or inquiry intent relevant to textile manufacturing.
Map and opening hours should only render when valid location or hours data exists.

mustPass: Scaffold must reflect textile manufacturing needs with dedicated product and production pages.
Home and contact routes must always be present.
Every default route must have a matching sectionsPerRoute entry.
Copy structure must support inquiry/contact conversion rather than checkout flows.
Trust signals should use real company facts, references and contact details.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: generic local-service structure without manufacturing-specific pages
restaurant, portfolio or ecommerce-specific routes that do not fit the industry
invented certifications, production volumes or customer counts
overpromising fixed prices or lead times without supporting data
repeating the same trust claim in multiple adjacent sections

compatibleDossiers.comment: Kandidat-rekommendationer härledda ur branschprofilen; verifiera mot riktiga Dossier-id före promotion.

selectionProfile.embeddingText: Textilvarutillverkning, tillverkare av textila produkter, produktområden, material, sömnad, produktion, specialanpassning, serietillverkning, företagsfakta, referenser, kontakt och offertförfrågan.
llmClassificationHints: Use this scaffold when the business manufactures textile goods rather than primarily selling finished retail products online.
Prefer this scaffold when product categories, production methods, materials or customization are central to the business.
Do not choose this scaffold for pure textile retail, fashion ecommerce or tailoring-only service businesses unless manufacturing is the core identity.

variants.label: Draft Default
variants.description: Startvariant kopierad från referens-scaffoldens default så kandidaten kan förhandsgranskas; ersätts vid kurering.
